description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The structure features a spacious open-plan layout, including a large swimming pool and a landscaped patio area with palm trees. The front section includes a two-car garage with colored vehicles visible, while the rear section opens to a detached building, possibly a guest house or studio. Large glass windows and sliding doors provide ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, with clean lines and geometric forms dominating the design. The property is enclosed by low boundary walls, offering privacy while maintaining an open, airy feel.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a pool, garage, and detached rear building, featuring large windows and minimalist landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage with two cars, pool, patio, and main entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated layout, pool, and detached rear building.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the main building, patio, and landscaping details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the open pool area, patio, and garage placement.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
